title: Auto Nether Wart
description: This mod automatically detects dropped Nether Wart items resting on Soul Sand and instantly plants them into the block above, consuming one Wart per placement.
body: Automatically plants dropped Nether Wart onto Soul Sand as soon as it lands, without any redstone or manual effort. It listens for new Nether Wart item entities and does a quick nearby scan every few ticks around each player, keeping overhead low while preserving Minecraft’s normal item behavior.
